backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Trip, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app, including role-based access control, user profile management, and trip operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three driver dashboard availability-toggle features (lock on accepted trip, restore on completion, checklist comment) to their implementing frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in routing, hooks, components, and pages of the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Namma Driver Pilot' that mounts the React root and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup with role-based route guards for customer, driver, admin, and admin-upgrade routes, plus a root layout that conditionally shows the profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin UI tab showing a searchable, scrollable table of all trips with customer/driver emails, formatted pickup/dropoff locations, color-coded status badges, and creation dates.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, scrollable table of all users with their email, full name, role (color-coded badge), and join date. Fetches data via the `useGetAllUsers` hook.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Lists all requested trips available for drivers to accept, showing pickup/dropoff locations and timestamps. Provides an Accept button that calls the `useAcceptTrip` mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of the current customer's trips with pickup/dropoff locations, status badges, and creation timestamps. Fetches data via `useGetMyTrips`.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Displays a driver's profile card including service area, vehicle experience, availability, and earnings, with availability locked to 'Available' when the driver has an accepted trip. Includes an Edit Profile button that triggers a callback.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Shows a driver's trips in a scrollable list with status badges and a 'Mark as Completed' button for accepted trips. Uses `useGetMyTrips` and `useCompleteTrip` with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form for editing a driver's profile including service pincode, area name, vehicle experience checkboxes, transmission comfort, languages, and availability toggle. Availability is forced to true and locked when the driver has an accepted trip.
Dialog wrapper that renders `EditDriverProfileForm` inside a modal, passing through the user profile and accepted-trip lock state. Returns null if no profile is provided.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Top-level page layout component that wraps content with a `Navigation` header and a footer crediting caffeine.ai. Uses a flex-column structure to keep the footer at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar component that displays the app logo, and when authenticated shows a dropdown menu with the user's profile info, role-based dashboard link, and logout option.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to enter their email and full name to create an initial profile without a role, which is assigned on a subsequent role selection screen.
Form component for customers to create a trip request, supporting local/outstation trip types, manual or GPS-based pickup/drop locations, vehicle type selection, and duration/date-time inputs.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal that prompts a newly registered user to permanently select their role (customer, driver, or admin), with admin selection gated behind a setup code.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor using React Query, exposing loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, role management, admin upgrade, and trip creation/retrieval operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using earth tones and warm greens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying logged-in identity info, user/trip stats, and tabbed views for managing all users and trips via AdminUsersTab and AdminTripsTab components.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page with a form allowing a user to enter a secret setup code to upgrade their account to admin role, redirecting to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page showing a ride request form and a list of the customer's trips side by side in a two-column layout.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page with tabs for available trips and the driver's accepted trips, plus a driver profile section with an edit modal and availability toggle locked when a trip is active.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with a hero section and feature highlights that triggers Internet Identity login and redirects authenticated users to their role-appropriate dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Displays a role selection page (Customer, Driver, Admin) for authenticated users without an assigned role, redirecting to the appropriate dashboard if a role is already set or back to landing if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via oklch variables, border radius, fonts, animations) and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Namma Driver Pilot, including existing implemented features and pending feature requests focused on locking the driver availability toggle when an accepted trip exists.
